docs.event: On 26 August 2022 at 9:18 pm, James said goodbye to John, first by saying, 'See you John, bye!' and later adding, 'Of course, there are also light beers!'. John responded by agreeing and planning to meet the next day at McGee's Pub, to which James confirmed, 'See you John, bye!'.

On June 16, 2022, at 5:07 pm, James shared a photo of a dog laying on a person on a couch with John, expressing his gratitude for having a support system. He then shared a photo of a video game scene featuring a man and a woman, indicating that he had recently signed up for a cooking class and felt motivated to learn something new. John, who had started a blog about coding, shared a photo of his computer screen with a program on it and expressed excitement about his new venture. James encouraged John, asking about his progress and sharing his own experiences, including his cooking class and a great omelette he made during the first lesson.

On 29 April 2022 at 2:36 pm, James thanked John for a book recommendation, sharing a photo of a set of three books on a wooden table. James expressed gratitude and shared his excitement about checking out the trilogy, mentioning that his dog Daisy had joined him while he was playing a game. On 3 October 2022 at 9:20 am, James again thanked John for a game recommendation, sharing his enthusiasm for the immersive world and story of the game John suggested. On 5 November 2022 at 5:20 pm, James thanked John for a gaming genre suggestion, expressing interest in trying a new game in the sports genre, specifically mentioning FIFA 23.

On 7 November 2022 at 8:57 pm, John bid farewell to James, saying 'Thanks, gonna go, sorry. Cheers! Bye!'. James responded with 'Later! Take care!'. On 9 July 2022 at 5:13 pm, James bid farewell to John, saying 'Thank you, John! Take care and see you soon!', to which John replied, 'Take care, bye!'. On 12 April 2022 at 9:52 am, James bid farewell to John, saying 'Cheers! Will do. Enjoy the gaming! Bye!', to which John responded, 'Bye for now!', and James concluded with 'See ya! Take care!'.

On 13 June, 2022 at 4:30 pm, John expressed his gratitude to James for his support during his job search. John had just received an offer for his dream job after numerous interviews and late nights, and he was thrilled about starting his new journey next month. James congratulated John and inquired about the start date. On 10 August, 2022 at 9:16 am, John thanked James again, asking about his recent activities. James mentioned taking his three dogs to a beach outing to bond with other dogkeepers. John appreciated the experience and shared a photo of a refrigerator with a calendar and a magnet. On 9 July, 2022 at 5:13 pm, James thanked John and wished him well, to which John responded with a similar sentiment.

On 17 March 2022, John inquired about what project James was working on that made him feel accomplished. James shared that he had been wanting to create a computer game since he was a child, showing a photo of a drawing of a girl in a plane. He explained that he had been drawing comics as a kid and now wanted to turn his childhood sketches into a game. On 1 September 2022, John expressed admiration for James's game, sharing a screenshot and asking what inspired him to create it. James mentioned his love for strategy games like Civilization and Total War, which motivated him to challenge himself and create his own game. On 2 October 2022, John asked James what inspired him to create his game, and James shared that the Witcher 3 had a significant impact on him, inspiring him with its world and story, and pushing him to create something cool. John also inquired about future plans for game development, to which James did not provide specific details.

On April 29, 2022, at 2:36 pm, James inquired about John's current projects, specifically mentioning his first professional project, which was a website for a local small business. John expressed gratitude and shared that the project was a great opportunity to apply his class knowledge. James congratulated John and inquired about the progress of the project. On June 13, 2022, at 4:30 pm, John asked James to elaborate on his projects, focusing on a new part of a football simulator where James was working on collecting player databases. James mentioned that the task was challenging but completed successfully. On November 7, 2022, at 8:57 pm, James asked John about a specific project he had worked on, and John shared that he had collaborated with a game developer to create an online board game, expressing his pride in seeing his ideas come to life. John also inquired if James chose his course because of his love for football.

On September 4, 2022, at 9:23 pm, James inquired about recent developments in John's life. John responded by mentioning he had purchased new gaming equipment, specifically new headphones, to enhance his gaming skills. James asked for more details, inquiring about the company John chose and other devices he bought. On October 13, 2022, at 2:14 pm, John asked James about any new developments in his life, sharing that he had recently organized an online competition with his programmer friends, which was a great experience. James congratulated John and shared that he had made and released his first game, expressing excitement about the experience. John inquired about the fulfillment James felt from seeing players engage with the game world he created. On September 20, 2022, at 8:56 pm, John mentioned he had started a new startup, a portable smoker, and had already welded one from metal, asking James for his opinion on the appearance. James responded by asking about any new developments in John's life.

On 6 August 2022 at 1:45 pm, John expressed gratitude for James's support, mentioning his plan to host Fortnite competitions and gain experience. James responded positively, suggesting that trying different game genres could be beneficial. John thanked James for his support, stating, 'Thanks! I am very glad that you support me in my new endeavor!' On 13 October 2022 at 2:14 pm, John reaffirmed his support for James, saying, 'I'm here for you. Anything you need, count on me!' James acknowledged this support and thanked John, saying, 'Thanks, John! Your support is really appreciated.' John responded, 'No worries, James! We make a good team.' On 4 September 2022 at 9:23 pm, James thanked John for his support and expressed appreciation, saying, 'Thanks for your support, John! I really appreciate it. I hope I can treat you to my creation once I learn a little more about cooking.' John encouraged James, saying, 'I look forward to it, James, you can do it!' James added, 'Your words give me even more strength to pursue my new hobby!'

On 6 August 2022, at 1:45 pm, John inquired about James's recent activities, mentioning that he had taken his puppy to the clinic the previous day. John expressed concern about the puppy's health, asking if it was okay. James responded that the puppy was fine. John then shared a photo of his desk with a computer monitor and keyboard, indicating he was currently working on some freelance programming to improve his coding skills.

On 29 April 2022, at 2:36 pm, James inquired about John's current activities, to which John replied that he was taking on freelance programming to hone his coding skills, finding it challenging but rewarding. James encouraged John, noting that freelancing is a great way to sharpen skills and gain experience, and asked about the specific projects John was working on.

On 4 May 2022, at 7:01 pm, John inquired about James's recent activities since their last conversation, mentioning an eventful week. James responded that he had been working on a project for weeks but encountered a frustrating issue that prevented him from finishing it. John empathized with James's frustration and asked for more details about the problem with the project.

On April 29, 2022, at 2:36 pm, James asked John about the game he has been playing lately. James shared a photo of a person holding a blue controller and mentioned that he has good cuddle buddies who love to watch him gaming. John replied that he is currently playing AC Valhalla and suggested that James try some strategy games. James thanked John and shared a photo of a map of the world on a TV screen, indicating he is trying out strategy games as well.

On November 5, 2022, at 5:20 pm, James inquired about the games John is currently playing, expressing his interest in new recommendations. John recommended FIFA 23, a great football game that allows online play with players from around the world. James expressed interest in trying a new gaming genre, specifically the sports genre.

On April 4, 2022, at 2:13 pm, John asked James about the game he likes to play with his team, emphasizing the importance of communication and teamwork in gaming. James mentioned that he uses voice chat for effective communication with his team. John praised this method and inquired about the game James plays with his team.

On 22 July, 2022 at 9:49 am, John expressed gratitude to James for the advice he received. John said, 'I'll definitely look into that. Appreciate the advice!' James responded, 'No worries, John! Happy to help. Just let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with.' John then shared a photo of a group of children holding a skateboard from elementary school, expressing his gratitude and reminiscing about their friendship. On 23 April, 2022 at 11:04 am, John sought advice from James about a new algorithm he was working on but was stuck with. James suggested breaking the problem down into smaller steps and seeking help from other programmers. John thanked James for the advice, saying, 'Thanks for the advice, James. Much appreciated.' On 21 October, 2022 at 7:36 pm, James expressed gratitude and intention to remember John's advice, saying, 'Thank you very much, I will definitely keep this in mind!' John then gave a piece of advice to James, saying, 'And remember, you don't have to be friends with every character in this game. I don't want to spoil it, but just remember this!' James acknowledged the advice, saying, 'I'll definitely take your advice, John! Thank you for avoiding spoilers.'

On 7 November 2022 at 8:57 pm, James bid farewell to John and wished him well, saying, 'Luna's a great name!' John responded with, 'Thanks, gonna go, sorry. Cheers! Bye!,' to which James added, 'Later! Take care!'. On 3 October 2022 at 9:20 am, James wished John well and said goodbye, saying, 'Cool, John. Will do! Take care, see ya!' John replied, 'Take care! Enjoy that new computer. Later!' On 12 April 2022 at 9:52 am, James again bid farewell to John, saying, 'Cheers! Will do. Enjoy the gaming! Bye!' John responded with, 'Bye for now!', and James concluded with, 'See ya! Take care!'

On August 6, 2022, at 1:45 pm, John shared a photo of a desk with a computer monitor and keyboard, mentioning that he will do something if necessary. James responded by sharing that he took his puppy to the clinic the previous day, to which John expressed concern about the puppy's well-being. On August 21, 2022, at 3:57 pm, John shared a photo of his new gaming desk with a computer and a keyboard, expressing his excitement about his new gaming setup, which includes a powerful graphics card and a headset for immersive sound. He shared that he has a similar gaming chair and keyboard. John also mentioned that he has been using his gaming PC for intense games and that gaming helps him stay focused and motivated. James, in response, shared a photo of his gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair, and mentioned his regular gaming group and their recent get-together.

On June 13, 2022, at 4:30 pm, John expressed his gratitude to James for his support after securing his dream job. John shared his excitement about the job offer and mentioned that he had gone through numerous interviews and late nights to achieve this. James congratulated John and expressed his happiness for John's success. On August 21, 2022, at 3:57 pm, John thanked James again, saying he was looking forward to family game night and that it was nice catching up. James responded by saying he was glad to talk to John and wished him a great time at the game night. On June 16, 2022, at 5:07 pm, James expressed his gratitude to John for his support, mentioning the importance of taking breaks for recharging. John acknowledged James's statement and assured him that he would always be there to support him, advising James to take care of himself.

On 7:33 pm on 23 May, 2022, James inquired about what was new with John. James shared that he had an awesome time at the amusement park with his friends last weekend, mentioning that he went on some great roller coasters and other attractions like the Ferris wheel, electric cars, and buggies. He also noted that it reminded him of his childhood and felt like he was in a video game. John responded positively, expressing that the rides brought back great memories and asked if there were any other attractions besides the roller coaster. James then asked John what was new with him.

On 9:16 am on 10 August, 2022, John inquired about James's recent activities. John shared a photo of his gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair, stating that he had organized his workplace. James complimented the wall lighting in John's workspace. John then asked James what was new with him.

On 1:45 pm on 6 August, 2022, John inquired about James's recent activities. John shared a photo of his desk with a computer monitor and keyboard and asked what was new with James. James mentioned that he took his puppy to the clinic the previous day. John expressed concern, asking what happened to James's puppy and if it was okay.

On 9:49 am on 22 July, 2022, John bid James farewell by saying, 'Still, the photo is amazing!' James responded, 'I have to go, I'm tired over the last two days. Bye!' John then said, 'Take care, bye!'On 9:52 am on 12 April, 2022, James bid farewell to John by saying, 'Cheers! Will do. Enjoy the gaming! Bye!' John replied, 'Bye for now!'On 2:13 pm on 4 April, 2022, James bid farewell to John by saying, 'Sure John, I'll keep you updated on all the new games. Talk to you soon! Bye for now!' John responded, 'Let me know how it goes. Stay safe. Talk to you soon. Bye!'

James responded positively, suggesting that trying different game genres could be beneficial. John explicitly thanked James for his support, stating, 'Thanks! Taking breaks is important for recharging. Thanks for the support!' James responded, 'No problem, always here to have your back. Take care of yourself!'

James responded positively, encouraging John and suggesting that playing chess will help develop his skills. Taking breaks is important for recharging. Thanks for the support!' John replied, 'No problem, always here to have your back. Take care of yourself!' John appreciated this support, saying, 'Your friendship really means a lot. I'm going through some difficult times now and it's really good to know I've got someone like you.' James further affirmed his support by offering to be a listener, stating, 'Just know I'm here if you need someone to talk or vent to. It might help alleviate some of the difficult times you're going through.'

On 10 August, 2022 at 9:16 am, John wished James a good time, encouraging him to call Samantha and hoping everything would work out for him. James confirmed he would call her. On 21 August, 2022 at 3:57 pm, James wished John a good night, advising him to have fun and suggesting they chat soon. On 31 October, 2022 at 12:37 am, John wished James good luck regarding their time together at the bar, expressing excitement and asking James to keep him posted.

John described the game as a simple, text-based adventure game that helps with coding skills and fun. John also mentioned that they might create their own video games in the future. James shared his interest in creating a strategy game like Civilization, highlighting the complexity and depth of such games. John suggested that voice chat is a good plan for communication. They raised a decent amount for a children's hospital, making the event both fun and meaningful. James praised John for using their love of gaming for a good cause.

On October 3, 2022, at 9:20 am, John expressed excitement about James's interest in RPGs, specifically mentioning his enthusiasm for the game Cyberpunk 2077. James shared his excitement about the game and asked John for his opinion. John confirmed that he had played the game and described it as 'awesome' with an immersive world and an amazing story, encouraging James to try it. On October 13, 2022, at 2:14 pm, John expressed further excitement about James's future journey in game development, praising his determination and love for the field. John encouraged James to keep going and assured him that he would do great things, emphasizing his support. James acknowledged this support and expressed his own excitement about creating more enjoyable gaming experiences. On March 27, 2022, at 12:40 am, John shared his experience of playing CS:GO in an intense tournament, describing it as thrilling. James acknowledged the thrill of competition in gaming and expressed his own excitement about the competitive aspect of the game, which inspired John to improve his own gaming skills.

On March 17, 2022, at 3:47 pm, John inquired about what motivates James to work on his programming projects. James explained that creating something and seeing it come to life gives him a great sense of accomplishment, and he keeps track of his goals in a notebook, which he finds very satisfying. James shared a photo of a person holding a notebook with a list of things on it. John then asked James about the specific projects he is working on, to which James responded that he is looking to branch out and suggested that John might have some ideas for new areas to explore in programming. On October 21, 2022, at 7:36 pm, James asked John for ideas on new areas to explore in programming, noting that trying new things keeps them on their toes and helps their creativity. On 6 August 2022 at 1:45 pm, John expressed gratitude to James, saying, 'You're a great host, James! Well, I have to go, bye!'. James responded with, 'Thanks, John! Have fun and let's chat soon. Have a good night!', further expressing his well-wishes. On 4 September 2022 at 9:23 pm, James thanked John for his support, saying, 'Thanks for your support, John! John responded with, 'I look forward to it, James, you can do it!', and James added, 'Your words give me even more strength to pursue my new hobby!'.

On 22 July 2022, John recalled a photo from elementary school and shared it with James, showing a group of children holding a skateboard. John expressed gratitude and mentioned that Jill would be delighted. James acknowledged the photo and shared a photo of two people standing in front of a giant head, saying,

John responded by sharing the name of the dog, Luna. James commented positively on the photo and asked John who the people in the photo are. On 7 November 2022, John asked James who the people in the photo of two people standing in front of a giant head are, indicating that he had previously shared a photo of a group of children holding a skateboard with James.

On 3:47 pm on 17 March, 2022, John expressed excitement about James's project, acknowledging the combination of his passions and the potential outcome. John shared a photo of a medical chart with instructions for the procedure and said, 'That sounds really fulfilling! Combining your passions to make something new must be so exciting. Can't wait to see the outcome.' James responded with gratitude and enthusiasm, saying, 'Thanks John! It's super exciting. I'll keep you updated on the progress. Perhaps, thanks to your knowledge of HTML, I'll invite you to help with some things in my game.' John added, 'It will be great to work with you, James.' On 9:20 am on 3 October, 2022, John expressed excitement about his new role as a programming mentor for game developers, saying, 'They asked me to be a programming mentor for game developers. I'll be teaching coding and assisting with projects. I'm really excited to share my knowledge and motivate people who are passionate about gaming.' James expressed his excitement for John, saying, 'Wow, John! Mentoring programmers to make games sounds awesome! You must love it. How do you feel about starting this journey?' John replied, 'I'm so excited and inspired! It's a great chance to help them and boost my own skills. I love sharing what I know and seeing others reach their potential - it's so rewarding!' On 4:30 pm on 13 June, 2022, John shared his news about getting his dream job and said, 'I finally got my dream job! After lots of interviews and late nights, I got the offer and was ecstatic. Can't wait to start my journey!' James expressed his excitement for John, saying, 'Wow, John! Congrats on getting your dream job. I'm super stoked for you. When do you start?' John replied, 'Thank you! I'm starting next month.'

On 9:26 pm on 20 March, 2022, James offered to help John find a pet, emphasizing the love and companionship pets bring. John acknowledged the offer and expressed his gratitude, saying, 'Cheers, James! Yeah, I'll keep that in mind. Appreciate the offer.' James responded, 'No problem, John! Let me know whenever you need assistance. Take care!'On 9:59 pm on 19 June, 2022, James offered to help John with a job opportunity, stating that there were still some previous staff available and that he could introduce John to them. John thanked James for the opportunity, asking if there would be an interview. James assured him that no interview was necessary, only that he be friendly, polite, and have a great desire to help people. John expressed his gratitude, saying, 'Thank you very much! Will there be some kind of interview required?'On 8:56 pm on 20 September, 2022, John thanked James for his offer to help, saying, 'Cheers, James! Appreciate your offer to help. I'll definitely let you know when the testing is ready. By the way, here is the book that helped me create the puzzles for this game.' He shared a photo of a book with a cartoon of a man playing a game. James responded, 'Wow, that book looks great! What other resources do you use to improve your game? Tell me about your gaming tips!' John replied, 'It is filled with awesome tips and insights on game design. I also watch tutorials and keep up with developer forums for information and ideas. Basically, staying informed and constantly learning is key!'
